app_release_notes: v1.2.7 - Loadscope now walks you through load development step by step, with a clear next-step pop-up at each stage. Rifle & Setup has one clear "Next: Plan your ladder" button and saves your setup for you. Your measured targets can't get lost -- they auto-save -- and a new Targets tab in Libraries keeps your marked-up target photos, grouped by load. The Load Card now shows your pre-entered powder-test CBTO, plus clearer photo-import help and friendlier import messages.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.2.7 - Loadscope now walks you through load development step by step, with a clear next-step pop-up at each stage. Rifle & Setup has one clear "Next: Plan your ladder" button and saves your setup for you. windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.6 - Compare Loads now shows every load you've saved across all your workbooks (grouped by rifle), and the Load Card prints the correct group, mean radius, and vertical SD for a powder-charge winner. Includes the 1.2.4/1.2.5 import fixes: Garmin xlsx import, target groups auto-pair by shot order, and cleaner staged-file handling.
